covers: dedup — a wider capture that reveals more of a hard-wrapped reason upgrades the key monotonically (never re-fires); an identical re-seen marker is deduped
marker-free-clear — a card dragged out of its attention column with a stale key and no marker clears the key only after TWO consecutive marker-free ticks (IN-06)
